summary: Iteration 4 - Final audit re-test: 42/42 PASS. Both bugs from iteration_3 confirmed fixed. All feature categories verified.

detailed_test_results.FIX1_product_not_found: PASS - /product/xxx shows 'Produit introuvable' with data-testid=product-not-found and 'Retour à la boutique' button. NOT showing Casque Bluetooth anymore.
detailed_test_results.FIX2_no_422_product_p1: PASS - /product/p1 loads with zero 422 errors in console. Mock IDs bypass API calls.
detailed_test_results.FIX3_no_422_homepage: PASS - Homepage loads with zero 422 errors in console.
detailed_test_results.PAGE_HOME: PASS - PromoBar BIELI10, hero, 9 products (All=9), sidebar categories, Electronics filter=3 products
detailed_test_results.PAGE_LOGIN: PASS - Split-screen, email+password fields, Google button present
detailed_test_results.PAGE_PRODUCT_p3: PASS - Sérum Éclat Vitamine C, price 42.00€, barré 68€, add-to-cart and buy-now buttons present
detailed_test_results.PAGE_CART_empty: PASS - 'Votre panier est vide' message displayed
detailed_test_results.PAGE_CHAT_UNAUTH: PASS - Shows 'Connectez-vous' prompt when not logged in
detailed_test_results.AUTH_FULL: PASS - admin@test.com login succeeds, redirects to /, User icon visible, /account shows email+ADMIN badge+Déconnexion
detailed_test_results.CART_FULL: PASS - Added 2 products, cart shows both items with +/- controls, BIELI10 applies -10% (Réduction 10%), total calculated correctly
detailed_test_results.TOAST: PASS - Toast 'Ajouté au panier' appears on add from homepage
detailed_test_results.CHAT_CLIENT: PASS - client@test.com login, chat loads, 'Test message audit' sent and visible on right side
detailed_test_results.ACCOUNT_FULL: PASS - Initial 'A', email admin@test.com, ADMIN badge, Aucune commande section present
detailed_test_results.EDGE_404: PASS - /product/xxx shows 'Produit introuvable' + 'Retour à la boutique' button
detailed_test_results.EDGE_MOBILE: PASS - No horizontal overflow at 375px, products/hero visible
detailed_test_results.EDGE_DIRECT_NAV: PASS - /cart, /chat, /product/p5 all load without errors via direct URL

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 42 tests PASS. Both iteration_3 bugs fixed: (1) /product/xxx correctly shows 404 UI; (2) mock IDs (p1-p9) no longer trigger API calls so no 422 errors. App fully functional.
mocked_apis: Catalog is MOCKED via mockData.ts (9 French products). Auth/Messages/Orders use live Railway API.
